results.title: Atmosphere in team positive, but inconsistency has hurt Delhi Capitals, says Ian Bell
results.description: Kolkata, May 23 (IANS) Delhi Capitals assistant coach Ian Bell said the mood in the camp remains upbeat despite the high‐stakes clash against Kolkata Knight Riders in the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 to be played at the Eden Gardens on Sunday evening. results.description: The FIFA World Cup returns this summer after four long years across North America. The highly anticipated showpiece event takes place across the USA, alongside Mexico and Canada, from mid-June.

results.title: Jockey dies one month after having both legs amputated following freak horse accident
results.description: Shane McGovern, 67, was crushed when his horse Reformist reportedly collapsed and died, pinning him beneath during routine exercise.
